steps.title: Use the remote setting
steps.content: Manul cats live in out-of-the-way places, and that remoteness explains why they are hard to study. The blank must describe habitats located away from large human populations.

steps.title: Reject the mismatches
steps.content: A says the habitats are attracted to humans, B says they are filled with people, and D makes the habitats responsible for people. Only a phrase meaning "far away from" matches the remote setting. The answer is C.
